case_title: MAUREEN E. SARMENT VS. NESTLE USA, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SARMENT, MAUREEN E. AS TO DEFENDANT NESTLE USA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-22-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-22-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-22-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SARMENT, MAUREEN E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NESTLE USA, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,145.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT NESTLE USA, INC.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO 05-06-11 AT 01:30 P.M. IN DEPT. 506 FOR TRIAL.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-06-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SARMENT, MAUREEN E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NESTLE USA, INC. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,145.00, (CLERICAL ERROR ENTERED WITHOUT TOTAL OF PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF $3,000.00 LISTED ON THE JUDGMENT, JUDGMENT SENT TO PARTIES ON MAY 9,2011) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
